skills.name: project-synthesis-product-constitution
skills.summary: Defines the product-level constitution, invariants, boundaries, and non-negotiable safety rules for ELMOS Project Synthesis.

skills.name: unified-synthesis-engine-contract
skills.summary: Defines the canonical engine API used by UI, CLI, agents, runners, and external integrations.

skills.name: project-synthesis-ir-schema
skills.summary: Defines PSIR, the canonical intermediate representation for requirements, domain behavior, architecture intent, and delivery constraints.

skills.name: artifact-graph-schema
skills.summary: Defines the graph linking requirements, PSIR nodes, architecture decisions, generated files, tests, evidence, and deliveries.

skills.name: synthesis-job-state-machine
skills.summary: Defines the lifecycle, transitions, guards, compensations, and terminal states of a synthesis run.

skills.name: synthesis-scope-and-engine-extension
skills.summary: Extends ELMOS scope resolution so new-project synthesis and legacy modernization share platform objects without mixing semantics.

skills.name: evidence-and-audit-contract
skills.summary: Defines evidence objects, audit records, signatures, retention, and claim-to-proof rules.

skills.name: policy-and-capability-model

skills.name: deterministic-run-context

skills.name: migration-synthesis-interoperability

skills.name: natural-language-session-orchestrator

skills.name: requirement-intent-classifier

skills.name: document-and-repo-input-adapter

skills.name: nonfunctional-requirement-extractor

skills.name: constraint-assumption-extractor

skills.name: ambiguity-question-generator

skills.name: conversation-memory-to-spec

skills.name: requirement-normalizer

skills.name: requirement-deduplicator

skills.name: requirement-conflict-detector
skills.summary: Detects logical, temporal, permission, data, technology, and quality-target conflicts.

skills.name: scope-boundary-manager

skills.name: requirement-priority-classifier

skills.name: requirement-risk-classifier

skills.name: measurable-quality-attribute-builder

skills.name: acceptance-criteria-generator

skills.name: definition-of-ready-validator
